visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy grey cardigan over a black top and a heart-shaped necklace, stands inside a bright retail warehouse. She speaks directly to the camera with an animated expression. Behind her are high metal shelves stocked with various boxed items and a large purple aisle sign numbered 31. (2) The camera pans right to show a large refrigerated display table filled with dozens of clear plastic containers of muffins. Each container contains six large muffins. Yellow and white price labels are visible on the edge of the display. The woman points toward the muffins while continuing to speak. (3) The woman picks up a container of chocolate chip muffins, holding it close to the camera to show the details of the baked goods. Her hands grip the plastic edges as she moves the box slightly to highlight different angles. The background shows other shoppers and stacks of bakery items under bright, flat industrial lighting. (4) Several close-up shots follow, focusing on different varieties of muffins including blueberry, coffee walnut with visible nut pieces on top, and banana walnut. The camera moves in a rhythmic, quick-cutting fashion to showcase the textures and flavors. (5) The woman is seen again, now holding the handle of a red shopping cart. She gives a enthusiastic thumbs-up gesture and points at the camera, her facial expressions conveying excitement. The setting remains the busy interior of the warehouse store with distant shoppers blurred in the background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 阿寶你看. (2) [Slogan]: 注意新制度 瑪芬可以單買. [Subtitle]: 好市多馬芬現在. (3) [Slogan]: 現在可以買一盒. [Subtitle]: 天啊 她現在終於可以單盒買了. (4) [Subtitle]: 而且他價格沒有變貴 一盒就是135元. (5) [Subtitle]: 這樣子你偶爾想要吃 你就可以買一盒回家放. (6) [Subtitle]: 你就再也不用買12個了2盒. (7) [Subtitle]: 以前跟人家分都超辛苦的. (8) [Subtitle]: 以前一次要買12個那個壓力都超大. (9) [Subtitle]: 現在可以直接買6個回去吃 哇. (10) [Variety]: 咖啡核桃口味. [Subtitle]: 然後現在還有咖啡核桃口味. (11) [Subtitle]: 這是最新的嗎? (12) [Subtitle]: 出了一陣子了. (13) [Subtitle]: 可是因為之前一次都要買12個所以我也很久沒買. (14) [Subtitle]: 現在一次可以只買一盒. (15) [Subtitle]: 這價格真的超划算 代表一個是. (16) [Variety]: 21塊. [Subtitle]: 21塊 哇 超棒. (17) [Subtitle]: 我最愛吃的是. (18) [Variety]: 藍莓口味. [Subtitle]: 藍莓口味 你們呢?. (19) [Variety]: 巧克力. [Subtitle]: 巧克力. (20) [Variety]: 咖啡. [Subtitle]: 咖啡. (21) [Variety]: 胡桃燕麥. [Subtitle]: 胡桃燕麥. (22) [Variety]: 香蕉核桃. [Subtitle]: 香蕉核桃. (23) [Subtitle]: 趕快分享給愛吃瑪芬的朋友. (24) [Subtitle]: 這樣子就可以吃最新鮮的 不用再擔心. (25) [Variety]: 保存的問題. [Subtitle]: 保存的問題了喔 好讚.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 4 shoppers/passers-by in the background aisle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long black hair, wearing a grey textured cardigan over a black top and a silver heart necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high-bay shelving, industrial pallets, bakery display tables with muffins, and purple aisle signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking with high energy and an enthusiastic tone in Taiwanese Mandarin. A bright, upbeat percussive BGM starts with a consistent, fast-paced electronic beat. Faint background room tone of a large retail space is audible. (2) A male voice reacts off-camera with an excited exclamation. The interplay between the female speaker's rapid-fire explanation and the male's supportive interjections creates a lively conversational atmosphere. The BGM remains constant in the background. (3) Soft plastic rustling sounds occur as an object is moved. The female voice maintains a high pitch and positive valence while listing specific information about product pricing. The acoustic environment is consistent with an indoor warehouse. (4) Short, playful cartoon-like sound effects (pops/dings) punctuate the audio track during a rapid list of flavor names. The speech density increases as the speakers alternate quickly between naming items and reacting with 'Wow'. (5) The female voice delivers a concluding call-to-action with high arousal and dominance, ending on a friendly, rising intonation. The music and background store ambience fade out abruptly as the clip concludes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform Costco members about a consumer-friendly change in the bakery's sales policy, specifically highlighting that muffins can now be purchased in single 6-count boxes instead of the previous mandatory 12-count requirement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic consumer-focused vlog using typical social media editing styles (fast cuts, text overlays, upbeat music) to share shopping tips and product news at Costco.
